sql: SELECT id, name, status FROM users WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY CASE WHEN #{sort} = 'name' THEN name WHEN #{sort} = 'date' THEN created_at ELSE id END LIMIT #{limit}
templateSql:
SELECT id, name, status FROM users
<where>
    <if test="status != null">
        AND status = #{status}
    </if>
</where>
<choose>
    <when test="sort == 'name'">
        ORDER BY name
    </when>
    <when test="sort == 'date'">
        ORDER BY created_at
    </when>
    <otherwise>
        ORDER BY id
    </otherwise>
</choose>
<if test="limit != null">
    LIMIT #{limit}
</if>
